subject: Yanma, a dragonfly-like insect Pokemon with large red compound eyes, green body, and translucent wings
description: A bright, cartoonish dragonfly-type creature hovers against a warm gradient background of green, yellow, and orange. The creature has large round red compound eyes, a slender green segmented body, and two pairs of translucent wings spread wide. Its body posture is upright and hovering with wings fully extended. The art is clean and cheerful in the classic Pokemon card style, with soft cel-shading and vibrant primary colors. The overall mood is energetic and playful.
foreground: Dragonfly-type creature with large compound eyes, green body, and spread translucent wings
background: Warm gradient wash of green, yellow, and orange
emotion: Alert and energetic; wings spread in mid-hover stance
